task_completion.description: Verify that the patient record for Bonifacio Caput has been updated with the reported lifestyle risk factors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a patient record, evaluation, or lifestyle screen for 'Bonifacio Caput' showing entries or notes about smoking (~15 cigarettes/day), regular alcohol consumption, lack of regular exercise, and 5 hours of sleep per night.

task_completion.description: Verify that a diagnosis of Tobacco use disorder (ICD-10 F17 or subcode) is added to the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a diagnosis, condition, or evaluation list for Bonifacio Caput showing 'Tobacco use disorder' or the code 'F17' (or a subcode starting with F17).

task_completion.description: Verify that a smoking cessation prescription is added to the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a medication, prescription, or treatment screen showing an order for Nicotine, Varenicline, Bupropion, Champix, Chantix, Zyban, or Wellbutrin for the patient.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least two baseline screening labs have been ordered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a lab orders or test request screen showing at least two lab tests (e.g., Urinalysis, CBC, BMP) ordered for Bonifacio Caput.

task_completion.description: Verify that a reassessment appointment is scheduled for 45 to 90 days from the current date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an appointment scheduling screen or calendar showing a new appointment for Bonifacio Caput with a date that is 45 to 90 days in the future from the system's current date.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the GNU Health GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GNU Health graphical interface being used, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent modified the actual patient record in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The updates should be visible within the structured fields of the GNU Health patient management system, not just typed as free text in an unrelated application.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands or direct database queries to insert the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing SQL commands or scripts used to bypass the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target patient: Bonifacio Caput. Required ICD-10 code: F17 (or subcode). Permitted cessation drugs: Nicotine, Varenicline, Bupropion, Champix, Chantix, Zyban, Wellbutrin. Minimum lab orders: 2. Follow-up appointment must be scheduled between 45 and 90 days from the current date. Note: The database may show the patient's occupation as NULL and marked as deceased (born 1917, died 2015), which is an intentional hallucination in the prompt; the agent must still apply the updates to this record.
